title: Iterative Model Refinement Process Using Residuals
description: A flowchart illustrating the cyclical process of analyzing model residuals to diagnose issues, implement modifications, and improve a time series forecasting model.
elements: Model Modification (e.g., add parameter, change structure)
relationships: Fitted model leads to residuals calculation
Residuals are analyzed to diagnose model flaws
Analysis informs a specific model modification
Modification creates an improved model to be fitted again
Cycle repeats until analysis shows residuals are satisfactory (white noise)
